name: Hartshorn German Christmas Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Obtain Hartshorn from your pharmacy, which is ammonium crystals.
2. Mix sugar, salt, shortening, eggs, and milk in one bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, dissolve the Hartshorn in boiling water until completely dissolved.
4. Add vanilla and anise seeds to the sugar mixture.
5. Combine the Hartshorn mixture with the sugar mixture.
6. Gradually add flour to the sugar mixture until stiff enough not to be sticky. This may require 4-5 pounds of flour.
7. Roll out dough on a floured surface and cut into desired shapes using cookie cutters.
8. Bake immediately in a moderate oven (325-350°F) for 10-15 minutes.
This entire recipe will make between 180-220 cookies. It is recommended to use half the recipe, yielding up to 100 cookies, but they are great!
